ddls:
CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the publication was made */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the publication in euros */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "is_hybrid" INTEGER /* Whether the publication is hybrid or not */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the publication */,
  "journal_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal */,
  "publication_type" TEXT /* Type of publication (e.g., paper, journal, book) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the publication (e.g., submitted, accepted, published) */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Whether the publication is open access */,
  "date_submitted" TEXT /* Date when the publication was submitted */,
  "date_published" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  "number_of_pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the publication */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the publication */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the publication is stored */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_journal_title FOREIGN KEY ("journal_title") REFERENCES journals ("journal_title")
)

CREATE TABLE "institutions" (
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each institution */,
  "institution_name" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the institution */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the institution */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the publisher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "journals" (
  "journal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each journal */,
  "journal_title" TEXT /* Full title of the journal */,
  "issn" TEXT /* International Standard Serial Number (ISSN) of the journal */,
  "impact_factor" REAL /* Impact factor of the journal */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the journal */,
  "is_open_access" INTEGER /* Whether the journal is open access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("journal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_journals_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Name of the author */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the author is affiliated */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the author */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Brief description of the author's research interests */,
  "orcid_id" TEXT /* ORCID identifier for the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author */,
  "order_of_authorship" INTEGER /* Order in which the author is listed on the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, librarian, admin) */,
  "institution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the institution where the user is affiliated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the user belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_institution_id FOREIGN KEY ("institution_id") REFERENCES institutions ("institution_id")
)
